dashboard.onboarding.title: Quick start
dashboard.onboarding.subtitle: After creating your project, complete these five setup steps.
dashboard.onboarding.step.material: Open Materials and add at least one filament material (brand, type, color).
dashboard.onboarding.step.printer: Open Printers, add your printer, place an NTAG215/216 tag on it, then write the printer tag via NFC.
dashboard.onboarding.step.storage: Open Storage Locations, create a storage place, attach an NTAG215/216 tag, and write the storage tag via NFC.
dashboard.onboarding.step.spool: Open Spools, create your first spool, and attach an NTAG215/216 sticker tag to the spool.
dashboard.onboarding.step.inventory: Open Inventory, scan the spool tag and then the storage tag to place the spool into storage.
landing.hero.headline: Your Filaments. Always Under Control.
landing.hero.subline: SpoolHero is the free solution for managing your 3D printing filament spools – clear, mobile-friendly, for individuals & teams.
landing.features.title: Everything You Need
landing.features.subtitle: SpoolHero combines all essential features for professional filament management in one application.
landing.feature.rfid.title: RFID Tracking (OpenSpool)
landing.feature.rfid.desc: Write filament data to NFC chips using the OpenSpool standard. Scan tags with your phone – the spool is recognized automatically.
landing.feature.materials.title: Material Database
landing.feature.materials.desc: Manage materials with temperatures, colors, density, and reorder links. Global materials are available to all projects.
landing.feature.projects.title: Team Projects
landing.feature.projects.desc: Create projects and invite team members. Granular roles (Admin, Manager, Member) and invitation codes make collaboration easy.
landing.feature.dryer.title: Dryer Monitoring
landing.feature.dryer.desc: Schedule drying cycles and receive email notifications when the dryer is done – so no filament over-dries.
landing.feature.inventory.title: RFID Inventory
landing.feature.inventory.desc: Scan two tags in sequence to assign spools to printers or storage locations. Location overview shows everything at a glance.
landing.feature.selfhost.title: Modern & Reliable
landing.feature.selfhost.desc: Built on .NET 8 and Blazor WebAssembly – fast, modern, and secure. Runs in the browser, works on desktop and mobile. Regular updates and active development.
landing.tech.label: Technologies
landing.free.title: Free. For Everyone.
landing.free.desc: SpoolHero is free to use – for individuals and teams alike. No hidden costs, no subscription model. The project is funded by voluntary community donations and affiliate links to recommended products.
landing.nfc.android.note: Writing NFC tags requires Android – iOS does not support NFC tag writing from the browser. A native app is planned based on demand.
landing.nfc.android.note.short: NFC writing is Android-only. iOS is not supported.
landing.openspool.title: OpenSpool Standard
landing.openspool.desc: SpoolHero implements the open OpenSpool standard – a unified JSON format for filament data on NFC tags (NTAG215/216). Compatible with other tools and printers that use the same standard.
landing.ntag.title: Recommended for NTAG215/216
landing.ntag.desc: Use writable NTAG215/216 NFC tags for printers, storage locations, and spools. Adhesive tags are the easiest option for mounting.
landing.opensource.title: Open Source
landing.opensource.desc: SpoolHero is open source and free to self-host. Run your own instance on your own hardware – full control over your data. Contributions are welcome.
landing.tos.title: Terms of Use
landing.tos.desc: By using SpoolHero, you agree to our terms of use. SpoolHero is provided without warranty – use is at your own risk. Affiliate links on this site help fund the service.
auth.privacy.accept: I have read and agree to the
auth.terms.required: Please accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
